ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the event took place */,
  "tny_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tour" TEXT /* Type of tournament */,
  "draw" TEXT /* Format of the tournament draw */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event they are participating in */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "server1" TEXT /* Name of the first server */,
  "server2" TEXT /* Name of the second server */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event related to the result */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* ID of the winning participant */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score details of the event */,
  "adf_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the result is an ADF (Alternative Dispute Format) */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "set_scores" TEXT /* Detailed scores for each set */,
  "winner_country" TEXT /* Country of the winning player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_by_play" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event related to this play */,
  "play_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the play events in the match */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for each play event */,
  "player_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., FU, Main) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., singles, doubles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of server (e.g., primary, backup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
